chip_chandler_intro.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_intro.text: Welcome to The Mandalay Bay! I'm Chip Chandler, guest services. Walk north to the casino floor — Dealer Dana runs Table 7.

chip_chandler_tips.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_tips.text: Your chip balance carries everywhere on the floor. Talk to NPCs with E or Enter. Good luck — the house is patient.

chip_chandler_secret.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_secret.text: Between us? The gold carpet tiles near the plants sometimes hide stories. Also — Tina by the slot aisle saw something weird last night.

chip_chandler_bye.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_bye.text: Enjoy your stay. Press E anytime you see the golden arrow!

dealer_dana_greet.speaker: Dealer Dana
dealer_dana_greet.text: Evening. Table 7 is open — six decks, H17, 3:2 blackjack. Minimum ten chips.

dealer_dana_watch.speaker: Dealer Dana
dealer_dana_watch.text: Smart. The felt remembers every hand. Come back when you're ready — I'll be here.

dealer_dana_return.speaker: Dealer Dana
dealer_dana_return.text: Back for another round? The shoe doesn't judge.

tourist_tina.speaker: Tourist Tina
tourist_tina.text: I came for the wave pool but ended up at the blackjack pit. Vegas, right?

tourist_tina_first.speaker: Tourist Tina
tourist_tina_first.text: Third! I heard there's a secret behind the north wall tiles. Probably nonsense. Probably.

tourist_tina_bye.speaker: Tourist Tina
tourist_tina_bye.text: If you find the shark aquarium, tell me — I got lost twice already!
